basic_details.job_title: UPTET 2026 Notification Out – Online Form, Eligibility, Exam Date, Selection Process
basic_details.short_information: UPTET Exam Date 2026: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has officially released the notification and exam date for the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026. Candidates who have applied or are planning to apply for Primary (Class 1-5) and Upper Primary (Class 6-8) teacher eligibility can check the complete exam schedule below. The examination is scheduled to be held on 02, 03, and 04 July 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly.

exam_pattern.details: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know about the UPTET examination: | Exam Mode: Offline (OMR Based / Pen & Paper) Total Marks: 150 Marks (per paper) Number of Questions: 150 MCQs (per paper) Duration: 150 Minutes (2.5 Hours) Negative Marking: No Negative Marking Subjects/Sections: Paper 1 (Primary - Class 1-5): Child Development & Pedagogy (30), Language I (Hindi-30), Language II (English/Urdu/Sanskrit-30), Mathematics (30), Environmental Studies (30) Paper 2 (Upper Primary - Class 6-8): Child Development & Pedagogy (30), Language I (30), Language II (30), Mathematics & Science or Social Studies (60)

content_sections.heading: UPTET 2026 Notification (Released) - Check Exam Date & Details
content_sections.text: UPTET Exam Date 2026: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has officially released the notification and exam date for the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026. Candidates who have applied or are planning to apply for Primary (Class 1-5) and Upper Primary (Class 6-8) teacher eligibility can check the complete exam schedule below. The examination is scheduled to be held on 02, 03, and 04 July 2026 . All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly. Latest Update: UPESSC has announced the UPTET 2026 exam dates. The examination will be conducted on 02, 03 & 04 July 2026 at various centers across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates can download the official notification from the official website. Quick Link: Download UPTET 2026 Notification PDF Key Highlights - UPTET 2026 Organization: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) Post Name: Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) - Primary & Upper Primary Exam Date: 02, 03 & 04 July 2026 Exam Mode: Offline (OMR Based / Pen & Paper) Official Website: upessc.up.gov.in Admit Card Release: 30 June 2026

content_sections.heading: UPTET 2026 Notification Complete Details
content_sections.text: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has published the official UPTET 2026 notification and exam schedule. This eligibility test is crucial for thousands of candidates aspiring for government teaching positions in Uttar Pradesh schools (Classes 1-8). The examination will test candidates' knowledge in Child Development & Pedagogy, Languages, Mathematics, Environmental Studies, Science, and Social Studies. Qualifying UPTET is mandatory for teacher recruitment in UP government schools.

rows.col_2: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for UPTET 2026

content_sections.heading: How to Download UPTET 2026 Notification?
content_sections.text: Candidates can follow these simple steps to check and download the UPTET 2026 notification from the official website: Step 1: Visit the official website of UPESSC at https://www.upessc.up.gov.in/ Step 2: On the homepage, look for the "What's New" or "Notifications" section Step 4: The notification PDF will open in a new window Step 5: Read all details carefully including exam dates, eligibility, and instructions Step 6: Download and save the PDF for future reference Step 7: Take a printout of the notification for your records Direct Link: Click here to download UPTET 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: UPTET 2026 Exam Pattern
content_sections.text: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know about the UPTET examination: Exam Mode: Offline (OMR Based / Pen & Paper) Total Marks: 150 Marks (per paper) Number of Questions: 150 MCQs (per paper) Duration: 150 Minutes (2.5 Hours) Negative Marking: No Negative Marking Subjects/Sections: Paper 1 (Primary - Class 1-5): Child Development & Pedagogy (30), Language I (Hindi-30), Language II (English/Urdu/Sanskrit-30), Mathematics (30), Environmental Studies (30) Paper 2 (Upper Primary - Class 6-8): Child Development & Pedagogy (30), Language I (30), Language II (30), Mathematics & Science or Social Studies (60)

content_sections.heading: Preparation Tips for UPTET 2026 Exam
content_sections.text: With the exam dates announced, candidates should focus on smart preparation strategies: 1. Create a Study Schedule: Divide your time wisely among all subjects based on your strengths and weaknesses. 2. Focus on Previous Year Papers: Solve at least 5-10 previous year question papers to understand the pattern and difficulty level. 3. Take Mock Tests: Regular mock tests will help you manage time and identify areas needing improvement. 4. Revise Regularly: Make short notes and revise them daily, especially for Child Development & Pedagogy and Current Affairs. 5. Stay Updated: Keep yourself updated with NCTE guidelines and UP education-related news.

content_sections.heading: UPTET 2026 Admit Card - When to Download?
content_sections.text: The UPESSC will release the admit card for UPTET 2026 examination on 30 June 2026 . Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website using their registration number and date of birth. Documents Required on Exam Day: Printed copy of Admit Card Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhar Card/PAN Card/Driving License/Voter ID) Recent passport-size photographs Required stationery items (Black/Blue Ball Pen as per instructions)

content_sections.heading: What After the UPTET Exam?
content_sections.text: After successfully appearing in the UPTET 2026 examination, candidates should: 1. Result Declaration: The result is typically declared within a few weeks after the examination. Results will be available on the official website. 2. Answer Key: Provisional answer keys may be released shortly after the exam. Candidates can raise objections if any discrepancy is found. 3. Next Stage: UPTET is a qualifying eligibility test. Qualified candidates can apply for teacher recruitment when UP government releases vacancies (no direct interview for TET qualification).

faq.question: Q1. When is the UPTET 2026 exam scheduled?
faq.answer: The examination is scheduled to be held on 02, 03 & 04 July 2026. Candidates can check the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the UPTET 2026 notification?
faq.answer: You can download the notification from the official website https://www.upessc.up.gov.in/ or use the direct link provided above.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the UPTET 2026 exam date?
faq.answer: As per the latest notification, the exam is scheduled for 02-04 July 2026. Any changes will be updated on the official website and our portal.

faq.question: Q4. When will the UPTET admit card be released?
faq.answer: The admit card is scheduled to be released on 30 June 2026. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Offline (OMR Based) mode. Check the official notification for exact details.
